category_sources: Official basecamp/kamal-proxy README describes Kamal Proxy as a minimal HTTP proxy for zero-downtime deployments.

display_name_sources: Official basecamp/kamal-proxy README uses the display name Kamal Proxy.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best official documentation surface found for standalone kamal-proxy.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/basecamp/kamal-proxy, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes HTTP proxy behavior and zero-downtime deployment use.
